Capability.description:
Capability identifiers advertised in `Info.capabilities`.

Variants are appended in the order in which they are surfaced. Step 6 extends the deterministic ordering to `[Info, Tap, Wait, Screenshot]`. Step 7 appends `Events` for the `WS /test/events` channel. Step 9 appends `Type` (T013) for `POST /test/type` and `Swipe` (T014) for `POST /test/swipe`. Step 14 appends `Elements` (T018) for `GET /test/elements`. T019 appends `State` for `GET /test/state` (app-defined state snapshot).

title: Info
